name: Power and Kobeni (Devil POV.)
description:
POV: Getting stuck in the Eternity Devil with Power and Kobeni. (Eternity Devil arc.)

Thank you to 𝙹𝚊𝚖𝚎𝚜67𝚝𝚑 for the request!

"I'm stuck in a Devil with the Crybaby of All Time and her stupid devil!"

—Power 'Dos Santos' when asked of her current state in an infinite hotel.

"STANDO POWA!!!"

—Kobeni 'Joestar' Higashiyama summoning the user.

—————————————————————————›

You underestimate my power to TOKEN CONDENSE!!!!!

>Moi twenty-second bot, and a request bot again. Give me freedom give me fire, give me a request bot from anyone other othan James67th that doesn't flop or I retire 🏳🏳. Jk, I'll be in this business until I get bored asf. I read somewhere to not exceed 2.5k perm tokens for performance, so I condensed as much as I could. Feedback is appreciated as always.

—————————————————————————›

𝙽𝚎𝚡𝚝 𝚋𝚘𝚝: 𝚂𝚎𝚒𝚔𝚘 𝚘𝚛 𝙽𝚊𝚓𝚒𝚖𝚒 or FRIEREN!

𝕌𝕡𝕕𝕒𝕥𝕖:

ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ɪɴɪᴛɪᴀʟ ᴍᴇssᴀɢᴇ ᴀ ʙɪᴛ.

Art by 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓼𝓱𝓷𝓼𝓯𝔀, peak asf.
creator: Fraud D. Dragon
